telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 2, 2026 Markets shrugged off Iran conflict escalation as energy disruption fears drove oil above $100, while crypto rallied on institutional momentum despite Fed hawkishness. The late-cycle rotation accelerated with investors positioning for Trump trade war policies, suggesting risk assets are pricing in geopolitical resilience over monetary tightening concerns. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $78,475 · ETH: $2,311 · SOL: $84.17 · GOLD: $4,612 · SPY: $720.65 (+1.3%) · QQQ: $674.15 (+1.9%) · VIX: $16.99 (+0.6%) · TLT: $85.61 (-0.1%) · DXY: $98.21 (+0.1%) · OIL: $101.94 (-3.0%) EVENING NEWS ▼ Just-In: Michael Saylor’s STRC Team Fires Back At Peter Schiff Over Bitcoin Criticism ▼ XRP Exchange Reserves on Binance Fall to 2.75B as Selling Pressure Eases ▼ Recent inflation data was 'bad news,' Fed's Goolsbee says  ▼ World Liberty Financial Faces Scrutiny Over 5.9B Token Sales and Vesting Rules ▲ Berkshire Cash Hits Record $397 Billion as Abel Keeps Buffett’s Anti-Bitcoin Stance ▼ Spirit Airlines Shuts Down at Airports Across US SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: Crypto institutional adoption and AI convergence offset Fed hawkishness ▼ Goldilocks: Energy shocks, trade wars, and persistent inflation undermine balanced growth ▲ Stagflation: Energy disruptions and trade tariffs driving inflation while growth slows ▲ Hegemony: US military escalation and trade war tactics signal assertive power projection ▲ Displacement: Institutional crypto adoption and AI-blockchain convergence accelerating REGIME CHECK — Neutral · Neutral · OVERHEATING · Gauge: 48.1/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT US Unseasonally Adjusted Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Apr) — May 12, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 3.3%) US Core Consumer Price Index (Unseasonally Adjusted) (YoY)(Apr) — May 12, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 2.6%) US NAR seasonally adjusted existing home sales (AAMR)(Apr) — May 11, 02:00 PM UTC (prev: -3.6%) Consumer Price Index for Residents (YoY)(Apr) — May 11, 01:30 AM UTC (prev: 1.0%) US Trade Balance (billion USD)(Apr) — May 9, 12:30 PM UTC Trade Balance (billion USD)(Apr) — May 8, 04:05 PM UTC (prev: 51.13) CONTRARIAN • Crypto's resilience during geopolitical stress suggests it's becoming a safe haven asset rather than • Energy shocks may accelerate renewable transition faster than expected, making oil volatility short- agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
